chapter-02/quarkus-in-action/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven compiler release property to target Java 21.
chapter-02/quarkus-in-action/pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode for Java 17 instead of 21 if this property is not updated.

chapter-02/quarkus-in-action/pom.xml.general_idea: Add explicit release configuration to the maven-compiler-plugin configuration block.
chapter-02/quarkus-in-action/pom.xml.why_exists: Ensures the plugin configuration explicitly targets Java 21, aligning with the property change.
